overall.description: First-person cockpit view from a flying vehicle navigating through a dense cyberpunk metropolis in Cyberpunk 2077. The vehicle travels from narrow neon-lit streets onto elevated highways, weaving between futuristic skyscrapers with holographic advertisements and complex multi-level interchanges.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person cockpit view navigating a narrow urban canyon lined with towering glass skyscrapers. Bright pink and green neon signs illuminate the corridor as the vehicle accelerates through the dense commercial district, beginning its ascent toward the elevated highway system.

segments.scene_description: The vehicle ascends from the narrow street onto an elevated highway system, transitioning from the enclosed urban canyon to open skyway. Red safety barriers line the ramp as the vehicle climbs, revealing a panoramic view of the sprawling cityscape ahead with another flying car visible in the distance.

segments.scene_description: The vehicle cruises along the elevated highway network through an industrial district, passing under overpasses and alongside smoke stacks. Other flying vehicles share the airspace at various levels as the camera navigates gentle curves, with holographic advertisements visible on the right.

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a complex highway interchange characterized by distinctive teal-colored curved railings. The camera follows a tight right-hand curve on the elevated ramp, passing under and over other highway levels, with the vehicle slowing to navigate the turn safely behind another white car.

segments.scene_description: The vehicle descends from the elevated highway into a narrow urban canyon between massive glass corporate towers. The perspective shifts from open skyway to enclosed street level, with red highway barriers marking the final approach to the lower road network as the vehicle navigates between the towering structures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person cockpit perspective as a vehicle ascends from a claustrophobic neon corridor into a sprawling, multi-level aerial highway system. It begins by accelerating through a narrow urban canyon of towering glass skyscrapers, where bright pink and green neon signs illuminate the dense commercial district. As the vehicle climbs, the enclosed street opens up into a wide skyway, passing red safety barriers that reveal a panoramic view of the cityscape and other distant flying cars. The scene then shifts into an industrial district, cruising along the elevated network under massive overpasses and alongside smoke stacks. Finally, the camera navigates gentle curves through the airspace, passing holographic advertisements while weaving among other vehicles at various altitudes.

The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective as a vehicle transitions from a sprawling elevated highway interchange into the claustrophobic depths of a corporate urban canyon. It begins by navigating a tight right-hand curve along a ramp defined by distinctive teal-colored railings, weaving through a multi-level network of overpasses while following a white car. As the vehicle clears the interchange, the open skyway begins to narrow, shifting the perspective downward toward the city floor. The scene then descends from the heights, passing red highway barriers that signal the transition from the high-speed ramps to the lower road network. Finally, the environment closes in completely as the vehicle enters a dense corridor of massive glass corporate towers that loom overhead.
